examples.title: Token Ring Node Operation
examples.description: Simplified pseudocode showing how a node handles token and transmits data
examples.code:
// Token Ring Node Algorithm
BEGIN
 state ← IDLE
 WHILE true DO
 IF state = IDLE THEN
 IF token_received THEN
 IF has_data AND priority_match THEN
 state ← TRANSMIT
 ELSE
 forward_token()
 END IF
 END IF
 ELSE IF state = TRANSMIT THEN
 prepare_frame()
 send_data_frame()
 wait_for_acknowledgment()
 release_token()
 state ← IDLE
 END IF
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: Shows the basic state machine of a Token Ring node: waiting for token, checking if it has data to send with appropriate priority, transmitting data, and releasing token.

examples.title: Polling Algorithm (Primary Node)
examples.description: Pseudocode showing how primary controller polls secondary nodes sequentially
examples.code:
// Polling Algorithm - Primary Controller
BEGIN
 polling_list ← [Node1, Node2, Node3, ..., NodeN]
 FOR EACH node IN polling_list DO
 send_poll_frame(node)
 WAIT_FOR_RESPONSE(timeout)
 IF response_received THEN
 IF response = DATA THEN
 receive_data_frame()
 send_acknowledgment()
 ELSE
 // Negative response - no data
 continue
 END IF
 ELSE
 // No response - node may be down
 log_error(node)
 END IF
 END FOR
 // Repeat polling cycle
 GOTO BEGIN
END
examples.explanation: Primary controller iterates through all secondary nodes, sending poll frames and handling responses. This ensures orderly access without collisions.

examples.title: Token Loss Detection and Recovery
examples.description: Algorithm for detecting token loss and initiating recovery process
examples.code:
// Token Loss Detection - Active Monitor
BEGIN
 TRT ← Token_Rotation_Timer
 WHILE network_active DO
 START_TIMER(TRT)
 IF token_received THEN
 RESET_TIMER(TRT)
 forward_token()
 END IF
 
 IF TIMEOUT(TRT) THEN
 // Token loss detected
 initiate_claim_token()
 END IF
 END WHILE
END

// Claim Token Process
PROCEDURE initiate_claim_token()
 broadcast_claim_token()
 WAIT_FOR_PROPOSALS(timeout)
 IF received_proposal THEN
 IF my_address > highest_proposer THEN
 become_active_monitor()
 generate_new_token()
 END IF
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: Shows how Active Monitor detects token loss via timer and how nodes participate in election to generate a new token.
